---
title: "PuMP: SUBSONIC HYDRA"
mainfont: Special Elite
---

__BACKGROUND__ <br>
A real speed demon he loves motorbikes, jet skis, planes, and any other fast vehicles*.
He's famous in various motor & water sports.
In his profession he crashed an experimental vehicle and was chopped in half.
Rather than dieing, he surived a new him grew form the bottom half.
This wasn't a shock though as it wasn't the first time.
The top half continued the famous life.
The lower half decided to do something more dangerous and exciting.
He joined PUML.

__PHYSICAL FEATURES__ <br>
__Blue racer:__ Adorned in cornflower blue leather attire for racing.
His jacket and trousers are covered in various sponsor badges*.
He protects his head with a reinforced motorbike helmet covered ina decal of blue and white flames.
His left foot is encased in a massive pointed metal boot like a medieval knight.
He wears a normal boot on his right*.

__PERSONALITY QUIRKS__ <br>
**Dependable but arrogant:** Any task or mission I set to him he will carry out with no grumbles.
He's an incredibly good mercenary, having picked up all aspects of combat in his training with utmost haste.
Now he thinks he knows everything.
I fear he'll only learn from disastrous mistakes if at all.
<br>
__Quick yet absent-minded:__ He is a very active and fit person. 
Though exceptionally fast when in action he has a bad tendency to day dream duirng down time.
Probably a form of energy conservation.

__FAVOURED GEAR__

- Vehicle lock pick kit
- Bag of tungsten carbide ball bearings
- Spectre M4 Submchine gun

__PRIMAL STATS__ <br>
JAWS:0 | EYES:-2 | LIMBS:+2 | NERVES:+1

__PRIMAL ABILITIES__ <br>
**Hydral regeneration:** He has amazing regeneration abilities. 
Small wounds may take minutes but loss of body parts can take months in a coma with nutrient tubes.
Its not magic rather its really powerful stem cells.
He has two special but identical stem cell producing organs: one in his head the other in his left foot.
Only body parts connected to one or the other will regenerate.
Strangely his left foot clone will be a perfect clone of SUBSONIC from when the separation occurred, memories and all.
Our SUBSONIC is from the fifth splitting.
<br>
**Kinetic transfer:** When touching an item he can increase its speed up to 342m/s*. 
When it leaves his touch this effect stops but and the item will decellerate normally. 

*Brilliant having someone who can pilot/drive pretty much any vehicle
*Most prominetly one for PUML
*I've told him this makes his weak points obvious but he pretends to not listen
*343 m/s is the speed of sound, therefore 342m/s and below is subsonic

MG note: SUBSONIC HYDRA will get captured in GREEN and used by Dr. Petra Pufferfish as a source of stem cells for her cloning of her self (these clones having all her memories).
She'll then capture the other hydral clones of SUBSONCI HYDRA (Andrea Dazzi, italian) to harvest their stem cells.
